title: Pattern Hunt
summary: Ada and Benny assemble cross-cultural world-tree references and identify repeated structural motifs across distant traditions.

narrative.newInfo: Independent myth sources share a non-random branching/convergence geometry.
narrative.dripHook: If this is an encoded map, what is the hidden referent?
narrative.payoffDelivered: Research lane gains direction and method.
narrative.beautyHooks: Independent traditions rhyme at structure level.
narrative.notes: Cadence: investigative momentum build. Function: widen evidence base. Exit: coincidence model starts collapsing.

rewardTokens.description: Cross-cultural overlap suggests shared encoded structure.
Ada/Benny collaboration keeps inquiry human and readable.
